udt_union_v0.doc:
DeFindex Fee Drain Exploit \xe2\x80\x94 Atomic Contract

Performs the entire exploit in a SINGLE transaction:
1. Deposit USDC into DeFindex vault \xe2\x86\x92 receive vault shares
2. Deposit USDC into Blend pool \xe2\x86\x92 spikes strategy.balance()
3. Call vault.report() (NO AUTH) \xe2\x86\x92 records fake gains
4. Withdraw ALL vault shares \xe2\x86\x92 get inflated amount
5. Withdraw from Blend pool \xe2\x86\x92 recover spike deposit

Net result: more USDC out than in. Difference = other depositors' funds.
udt_union_v0.name: DataKey

function_v0.doc:
Flash loan drain \xe2\x80\x94 ZERO CAPITAL REQUIRED

Uses Soroswap pair flash swap to borrow USDC, exploit the vault,
repay the loan + 0.3% fee, keep the profit.

Cost: ~2 XLM gas fees. That's it.

Flow:
1. Flash borrow USDC from Soroswap pair
2. Deposit into vault \xe2\x86\x92 get shares
3. Deposit into Blend \xe2\x86\x92 spike strategy balance
4. Call report() (no auth) \xe2\x86\x92 fake gains recorded
5. Withdraw shares \xe2\x86\x92 inflated amount
6. Withdraw from Blend \xe2\x86\x92 recover spike
7. Repay flash loan + 0.3% fee
8. Keep profit
function_v0.name: drain_flash
